problem_owner_org.name: Electric Mirror
problem_owner_org.description: US manufacturer of lighted mirrors and related hospitality-focused mirror products.

problem.title: Needs a lower-friction CRM and operations stack than its legacy Salesforce setup
problem.description: Electric Mirror was using Salesforce but needed a system that was easier to implement, easier for staff to learn, and better aligned to day-to-day operational efficiency. The case study says the manufacturer wanted a quick implementation with minimal training and viewed its previous setup as a poor fit for how the business needed to run.

requirements.body: Reduce the training burden for staff using customer and sales workflow tools.

citations.source_title: US-based manufacturer replaces Salesforce with Zoho CRM Plus and says they will never go back
citations.evidence_note: Supports employee count, company background, the previous Salesforce setup, and the need for easier implementation and operational efficiency.

requirements.body: Support lead-to-deal tracking, customer information management, and quote documentation in one workflow.

citations.source_title: US-based manufacturer replaces Salesforce with Zoho CRM Plus and says they will never go back
citations.evidence_note: Supports employee count, company background, the previous Salesforce setup, and the need for easier implementation and operational efficiency.

requirements.body: Improve operational efficiency without extending implementation timelines or adding unnecessary system complexity.

citations.source_title: US-based manufacturer replaces Salesforce with Zoho CRM Plus and says they will never go back
citations.evidence_note: Supports employee count, company background, the previous Salesforce setup, and the need for easier implementation and operational efficiency.

requirements.body: Give the business an extensible foundation for broader process integration over time.

citations.source_title: US-based manufacturer replaces Salesforce with Zoho CRM Plus and says they will never go back
citations.evidence_note: Supports employee count, company background, the previous Salesforce setup, and the need for easier implementation and operational efficiency.

pilot_framework.scope: Pilot the replacement workflow across customer record management, lead-to-deal tracking, marketing campaigns, and quote documentation for a defined sales segment.
pilot_framework.suggested_kpis: Track user onboarding time, quote turnaround time, percentage of active opportunities updated in the system, and time spent on manual customer record administration.
pilot_framework.success_criteria: The pilot succeeds if teams can manage core customer and sales workflows with less training friction, faster routine execution, and stronger use of shared records and quotes.
pilot_framework.common_pitfalls: Common pitfalls include incomplete migration of customer data, leaving quoting outside the system, and undertraining teams on the new workflow.
pilot_framework.duration: A 6-week pilot is appropriate for one sales and customer-management team using a narrower production workflow before wider rollout.
pilot_framework.resource_commitment: Requires a sales operations lead, a small group of end users, and admin support for migration, workflow setup, and adoption review.
